meta.summary: ByteDance Seed surfaced the clearest concrete artifact set, highlighting its Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview model and a new Full-Duplex Speech LLM aimed at more natural voice interaction with interference suppression. The rest of the signal is notably weaker: OpenMonoAgent.ai emerged as an open-source local coding agent, while SB Curated appeared as a named dataset for benchmarking Solidity vulnerability analysis tools, but neither came with the level of official validation or performance evidence needed for a higher-confidence strategic read.

featured_topics.headline: ByteDance Seed Expands Model Portfolio with Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview and Full-Duplex Speech LLM
featured_topics.summary_short: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0 as a new model release. The launch announcement was published on February 14, 2026
featured_topics.why_it_matters: ByteDance is signaling continued investment in both frontier multimodal models and voice interfaces, which matters for buyers and competitors tracking Chinese model labs beyond Alibaba and Baidu.
key_takeaways: ByteDance Seed disclosed Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena, indicating an externally visible model release rather than an internal-only research effort.
Seed also introduced a Full-Duplex Speech LLM focused on attentive listening, robust interference suppression, and more natural turn-taking, pointing to a push toward real-time conversational agents.
The cluster is backed by official ByteDance Seed announcements, giving it higher credibility than repo-driven or newsletter-driven signals.
ByteDance paired product disclosures with its 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment program, a hiring signal that suggests sustained investment in foundation-model R&D capacity.

evidence.title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment Open
Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Model Release on Arena

featured_topics.headline: OpenMonoAgent.ai Launches as a Terminal-Native Local LLM Coding Agent
featured_topics.summary_short: OpenMonoAgent.ai is presented as a terminal-native coding agent that runs on local LLMs. The project emphasizes unlimited local usage, open-source licensing, and remote accessibility from the user's own machine
featured_topics.why_it_matters: The product reflects rising demand for coding agents that avoid per-token API costs and keep inference on-device, a relevant trend for enterprise buyers with privacy or cost constraints.
key_takeaways: OpenMonoAgent.ai is positioned as a terminal-native coding agent powered by local LLMs, with the project emphasizing unlimited token usage on the user's own machine.
The repo markets itself as 100% open source and installable with a single command, lowering adoption friction for developers evaluating self-hosted agent workflows.
The stack is built on C#/.NET, which differentiates it from the Python-heavy agent ecosystem and may appeal to Microsoft-centric enterprise development teams.

evidence.title: StartupHakk/OpenMonoAgent.ai

featured_topics.headline: SB Curated Releases a Tagged Solidity Vulnerability Dataset for Tool Evaluation
featured_topics.summary_short: The smartbugs-curated repository provides a curated dataset of Solidity smart contracts annotated with tagged vulnerabilities. It is intended to support evaluation of automated smart-contract analysis tools
featured_topics.why_it_matters: Benchmark datasets often shape which security tools and research approaches gain adoption, especially in domains like smart-contract analysis where labeled data is scarce.
key_takeaways: SB Curated is a named dataset of Solidity smart contracts annotated with tagged vulnerabilities, giving researchers a structured corpus for evaluation.
The stated purpose is to measure the accuracy of automated analysis tools, making it directly relevant to vendors building AI-assisted code security and audit systems.
Because the artifact is a curated benchmark rather than a model, its strategic value lies in standardizing evaluation rather than claiming new state-of-the-art performance.

evidence.title: benqi-finance/smartbugs-curated
